	Project requirements clarified: Vue 3 SPA with TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, Vue Router, Axios, Pinia for e-commerce from DummyJSON API.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project structure created manually with all necessary files and folders.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Codebase customized with all required components, pages, services, types, and store.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions required for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed via npm install.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Not needed for this project.

- [x] Launch the Project
	User can run npm run dev to launch the development server.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created with project description, installation, and usage instructions.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
